name: Although there was no categorical ordinance in the early days prohibiting sexual
introduction:
intercourse between husband and wife during the nights of Ramadan, people generally
assumed that this was not permissible. Despite the feeling that their action was either not
permitted or was at least disapproved of, they did at times approach their wives. Such a
betrayal of conscience can encourage a sinful disposition. God, therefore, first reproaches
them with their lack of integrity, for this is what was objectionable. As for the act itself, God
makes it clear that it is quite permissible. Henceforth they might engage in sexual
intercourse as a perfectly lawful act unencumbered by feelings of guilt.
